title: Thoughts and things 1/4/2025
html:
Yahir is 2.5 days back in corvallis or for winter term, ringing with a hair-greying anxiety mostly tied to a $1900 rent debt to jeff from a mistimed pcc funds / jcef funds payment. He's leaning on breath, presence, and gym-time as the antidote.

TL;DR

  • Yahir owes jeff ~$1900 in rent because of a mistimed pcc funds auto-payment to clear his JCEF account.
  • The "head itching, hair turning white" anxiety pattern shows up here and recurs across early-2025 thoughts and things series entries.
  • He frames the antidote as breath + presence: "be in the moment, you are everything and you are nothing."
  • Gym is a stabilizer ("buckled in") but not yet at full intensity.
  • Sets the emotional baseline for the corvallis winter 2025 stretch.

jeff · corvallis or · anxiety pattern · thoughts and things series · breath as anchor · post china limbo
